request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate civil defense budgets, other nations are quietly preparing. Our neighbors have community shelters, emergency drills, and stockpiled supplies—why aren't we? It's not about fear, it's about fairness. Our tax dollars should protect us like they protect others. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst [Read more: bit.ly/defenseprep2026]
